tips: 🚗 Transportation is your biggest source. Consider carpooling, cycling, or switching to an electric vehicle.
✈️ Reducing one round-trip flight can save 500-2000 kg CO2 annually.
⚡ Switch to a renewable energy provider to cut electricity emissions by up to 85%.
🏠 Improve home insulation to reduce heating energy by 20-40%.
🥗 Reducing meat consumption by half can save over 500 kg CO2 per year.
🌾 Buy local and seasonal produce to reduce food transportation emissions.
